action.reasoning: Observation: Error on line 70 due to .item() on int. Analysis: targets are Python ints after .tolist(), need to fix. Decision: Fix bug, implement two-phase training with balanced sampler + mixup + cosine annealing, then freeze backbone and retrain classifier with effective weights. Run 30+10 epochs and submit eval.
